title: oldenlandia pentandra
intro: Oldenlandia pentandra, also known as "Five-Stamen Oldenlandia" or "Pentandra", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oldenlandia pentandra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and enhance immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
